data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The evidence provided does not demonstrate that the system successfully prevents double-booking, which is the core requirement of the exploratory step. While there are prior steps that show successful bookings, they do not address the specific scenario of double-booking prevention. The linked use case outlines the need for deterministic winner logic for simultaneous claim attempts, but there is no evidence that this logic was tested or validated in the context of the exploratory step.
gaps: No evidence confirming the successful prevention of double-booking in the scenario.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
